вӨ· You've been over Minjeong's house for two hours and sheвҖҷs done nothing but play her game with her friends. At first, you were okay with it but then the game started taking all of your girlfriendвҖҷs attention. She was even talking to the girls on voice chat. You were slowly getting annoyed but she didnвҖҷt want to seem prude.

So you decided to tease her and try to distract her from her gaming session with her fellow group of friends.
